all.en: Nexford Industries today released its earnings report for the third fiscal quarter.
all.zh: Nexford 工業今日發布第三財季的財報。

all.en: Total revenue reached 842 million dollars, up 11 percent year over year.
all.zh: 總營收達到八億四千兩百萬美元，年增百分之十一。

all.en: Operating income climbed to 128 million dollars, slightly exceeding analyst expectations.
all.zh: 營業利益攀升至一億兩千八百萬美元，略微超出分析師預期。

all.en: Gross margin expanded by 80 basis points compared with the same period last year.
all.zh: 毛利率較去年同期擴大八十個基點。

all.en: The consumer electronics division remained the largest contributor to top-line growth.
all.zh: 消費性電子部門仍是營收成長的最大貢獻者。

all.en: Sales in the Asia Pacific region grew by 18 percent during the quarter.
all.zh: 本季亞太區銷售成長百分之十八。

all.en: European markets showed modest improvement after several quarters of weakness.
all.zh: 歐洲市場在連續數季疲弱後出現溫和改善。

all.en: North American demand was steady, supported by strong enterprise software renewals.
all.zh: 北美需求穩定，受惠於企業軟體續約強勁。

all.en: Research and development spending rose to 64 million dollars this quarter.
all.zh: 本季研發支出增至六千四百萬美元。

all.en: The company opened two new distribution centers in Vietnam and Mexico.
all.zh: 公司在越南和墨西哥新開設兩個配銷中心。

all.en: Inventory levels remained well controlled despite ongoing supply chain volatility.
all.zh: 儘管供應鏈持續波動，存貨水準仍維持良好控管。

all.en: Free cash flow for the quarter totaled 95 million dollars.
all.zh: 本季自由現金流總計九千五百萬美元。

all.en: Long-term debt was reduced by 40 million dollars through scheduled repayments.
all.zh: 透過排定的償還，長期負債減少四千萬美元。

all.en: The board approved a quarterly dividend of 0.32 dollars per share.
all.zh: 董事會核准每股零點三二美元的季度股利。

all.en: Share buybacks during the quarter amounted to 50 million dollars.
all.zh: 本季股票回購金額達五千萬美元。

all.en: Diluted earnings per share came in at 1.14 dollars, beating consensus.
all.zh: 稀釋後每股盈餘為一點一四美元，優於市場共識。

all.en: Management cited disciplined pricing and product mix as key margin drivers.
all.zh: 管理層指出嚴謹的定價與產品組合為毛利的主要推手。

all.en: Foreign exchange headwinds reduced reported revenue by an estimated 1.5 percent.
all.zh: 匯率逆風估計使帳列營收減少百分之一點五。

all.en: The company recorded a one-time restructuring charge of 12 million dollars.
all.zh: 公司認列一筆一千兩百萬美元的一次性重組費用。

all.en: Forward guidance for the fourth quarter was raised across all key metrics.
all.zh: 對第四季的前瞻財測在所有關鍵指標上均上調。

all.en: Full-year revenue is now expected to land between 3.4 and 3.5 billion dollars.
all.zh: 全年營收預期現落在三十四億至三十五億美元之間。

all.en: The executive team will host an analyst day in November.
all.zh: 經營團隊將於十一月舉辦分析師日。

all.en: Investors responded positively, sending shares up nearly 6 percent after hours.
all.zh: 投資人反應正面，盤後股價上漲近百分之六。

all.en: Detailed financial statements are available on the investor relations website.
all.zh: 詳細財務報表已公布於投資人關係網站。

all.en: The earnings conference call is scheduled for tomorrow at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time.
all.zh: 法說會訂於明日東部時間上午 9 點召開。

all.en: A live webcast will be accessible to all interested investors and analysts.
all.zh: 有意參與的投資人與分析師皆可收看現場網路直播。

all.en: The Chief Financial Officer will provide additional color on segment performance.
all.zh: 財務長將針對各事業部表現提供進一步說明。

all.en: Capital expenditures for the quarter focused on automation and warehouse expansion.
all.zh: 本季資本支出聚焦於自動化與倉儲擴建。

all.en: The company has reaffirmed its commitment to returning value to shareholders.
all.zh: 公司重申致力於回饋股東價值的承諾。

all.en: Employee headcount grew by approximately three percent during the quarter.
all.zh: 本季員工人數約成長百分之三。

all.en: Sustainability initiatives helped reduce manufacturing energy consumption by seven percent.
all.zh: 永續行動方案協助生產能源消耗降低百分之七。

all.en: Several new product launches are planned across multiple regions for next quarter.
all.zh: 下一季多個地區將推出多項新產品。

all.en: Credit rating agencies have maintained the company's investment-grade rating.
all.zh: 信評機構維持本公司的投資等級評等。

all.en: The full annual report will be filed with regulators by the end of next month.
all.zh: 完整年度報告將於下月底前向主管機關提交。

all.en: The enterprise software segment posted record bookings driven by multi-year contracts.
all.zh: 企業軟體事業部受惠於多年期合約簽訂，預訂金額創新高。

all.en: Inventory turnover improved by 9 percent compared with the prior quarter.
all.zh: 存貨週轉率較上一季提升百分之九。

all.en: Working capital management initiatives generated 22 million dollars in cash savings.
all.zh: 營運資金管理行動方案帶來兩千兩百萬美元的現金節省。

all.en: Selling, general, and administrative expenses declined as a percentage of revenue this quarter.
all.zh: 本季銷管費用占營收比例下降。

all.en: Tax rates remained consistent with prior guidance at around 21 percent overall.
all.zh: 整體稅率維持與先前指引一致，約為百分之二十一。

all.en: Strategic partnerships in the cloud computing space continued to expand customer reach.
all.zh: 雲端運算領域的策略夥伴關係持續拓展客戶觸及範圍。

all.en: Acquisition integration costs are tracking below the original budget for the year.
all.zh: 併購整合費用低於本年度原定預算。

all.en: Currency hedging strategies helped mitigate the impact of recent global market volatility.
all.zh: 匯率避險策略協助緩解近期全球市場波動的影響。

all.en: Pension obligations remain fully funded under current actuarial assumptions.
all.zh: 在目前精算假設下退休金義務維持完全提撥。

all.en: Management expressed confidence in delivering another strong performance next quarter.
all.zh: 管理層對下一季再次交出強勁表現深具信心。
